name: myip
description: A better what's my IP Address

scripts.postinstall: node -e "const fs = require('fs'); const path = require('path'); const src = path.resolve('node_modules/@bower_components'); const dest = path.resolve('static/bower_components'); try { if (fs.existsSync(dest)) { fs.rmSync(dest, { recursive: true, force: true }); } fs.cpSync(src, dest, { recursive: true }); } catch (e) { console.error(e); process.exit(1); }"
